category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Compact Disc Input and Control Library.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the GNU Savannah project page; source_facts.repo provides the official GitHub README fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/libcdio/libcdio, so repo enrichment was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies compact disc input/control; source_facts.executables lists cd-info, cd-read, iso-info, and iso-read.
